name: Data Access Layer (Filesystem + SQLite)
description: The lib/data/ module that is the single gateway for all data access. Three-tier architecture: Tier 1 (lib/types/) defines domain types, Zod schemas, and Result<T> discriminated union. Tier 2 (lib/openclaw/, lib/pact/) provides internal parsers that separate I/O (read) from validation (parse) for testability. Tier 3 (lib/data/) is the public facade re-exporting domain-level functions with Map-based TTL caching. lib/db/ provides typed SQLite wrappers in WAL mode. All parsers return typed results with explicit error states. All filesystem access uses try-read-catch pattern (no existence checks). Base directories are always parameters for dependency injection in tests. Date strings use ISO 8601 format throughout. Naming convention: get* returns single item, list* returns arrays, create/update/delete mutate SQLite.

types.name: ErrorKind
types.description: Finite union of error categories for all data access operations.

types.name: DataError

fields.name: filePath
fields.description: Absolute path of the file that caused the error, or empty string if not file-related.

fields.name: originalError
fields.description: Stringified original error (e.g., ENOENT message, Zod error format output).

types.description: Structured error carrying context for debugging. Every failed Result includes one.

types.name: ResultOk

fields.name: value
fields.description: The successfully parsed/retrieved value. Actual type is generic T in implementation.

types.description: Success variant of the Result discriminated union.

types.name: ResultErr
types.description: Error variant of the Result discriminated union.

types.name: Result
types.description: Discriminated union for all data access returns. Discriminated on the 'ok' boolean field. Implementation uses TypeScript: type Result<T> = { ok: true; value: T } | { ok: false; error: DataError }.

types.name: AgentRole
types.description: Roles an agent can have in the OpenClaw system.

types.name: AgentStatus
types.description: Current operational status of an agent.

types.name: AgentDefinition

fields.name: workspaceDir
fields.description: Absolute path to agent's workspace directory.

fields.name: customRole
fields.description: Custom role description when role is 'custom'.

fields.name: lastActiveAt
fields.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of last activity, or empty if never active.

fields.name: configHash
fields.description: SHA-256 hash of the agent's config block for change detection.

types.description: An agent definition parsed from openclaw.json. Represents a configured AI agent.

types.name: AgentList
types.description: List of agent definitions.

types.name: OpenClawConfig

fields.name: baseDir
fields.description: Resolved absolute base directory of the OpenClaw project.

types.description: Top-level OpenClaw configuration parsed from openclaw.json.

types.name: PipelinePhase
types.description: Current phase of a PACT project pipeline, derived from directory contents.

types.name: ContractStatus
types.description: Status of a single PACT contract file.

types.name: PactContract

fields.name: filePath
fields.description: Relative path to the contract file from project root.

types.description: A single PACT contract and its current status.

types.name: PactContractList
types.description: List of PACT contracts.

types.name: TestResult
types.description: Outcome of a test execution.

types.name: PactTestSuite

fields.name: lastRunAt
fields.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of last test run, or empty if never run.

types.description: Aggregated test results for a PACT component.

types.name: PactTestSuiteList
types.description: List of test suites.

types.name: ComponentNode

fields.name: parentId
fields.description: Parent component ID, or empty string for root.

fields.name: hasImplementation
fields.description: Whether source code exists in src/ for this component.

fields.name: hasTests
fields.description: Whether tests exist in tests/ for this component.

types.description: A node in the PACT component decomposition tree.

types.name: ComponentNodeList
types.description: List of component tree nodes.

types.name: PactProjectConfig

fields.name: rootDir
fields.description: Resolved absolute root directory of the PACT project.

types.description: Parsed pact.yaml configuration for a PACT project.

types.name: PactProjectSummary

fields.name: contractedCount
fields.description: Number of components with non-missing contracts.

fields.name: implementedCount
fields.description: Number of components with source code.

fields.name: testedCount
fields.description: Number of components with passing tests.

types.description: Aggregated summary of a PACT project's state, composed from multiple parsed sources.

types.name: PactProjectSummaryList
types.description: List of project summaries.

types.name: TokenUsage
types.description: Token consumption for a single agent session or API call.

types.name: CostRecord

fields.name: endedAt
fields.description: ISO 8601 session end timestamp, or empty if still running.

fields.name: projectId
fields.description: Associated project ID, or empty if not project-scoped.

types.description: Cost data for a single session or time period.

types.name: CostRecordList
types.description: List of cost records.

types.name: CostSummary

fields.name: byAgent
fields.description: Map of agentId -> total cost USD.

fields.name: byModel
fields.description: Map of model -> total cost USD.

types.description: Aggregated cost summary over a time range.

types.name: UserTask

validators.error_message: Title must be between 1 and 500 characters.

fields.name: projectId
fields.description: Associated PACT project ID, or empty.

types.description: A user-created task stored in SQLite (dashboard-specific data).

types.name: TaskStatus
types.description: Status of a user task.

types.name: TaskPriority
types.description: Priority level for a user task.

types.name: UserTaskList
types.description: List of user tasks.

types.name: CreateTaskInput

validators.error_message: Title must be between 1 and 500 characters.

types.description: Input for creating a new task. Validated with Zod.

types.name: UpdateTaskInput

validators.error_message: Title must be between 1 and 500 characters.

types.description: Input for updating an existing task. All fields optional except id.

types.name: UserPreferences

validators.error_message: Refresh interval must be between 1000ms and 60000ms.

types.description: User preferences stored in SQLite.

types.name: CacheEntry

fields.name: expiresAt
fields.description: Unix timestamp in ms when entry expires.

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description: Unix timestamp in ms when entry was created.

types.description: Internal cache entry with TTL tracking.

types.name: CacheStats
types.description: Statistics about the in-memory cache.

types.name: ActivityEvent

fields.name: agentId
fields.description: Agent that triggered the event, or empty.

types.description: An activity event for the activity feed, derived from agent sessions and file changes.

types.name: ActivityEventType
types.description: Types of activity events.

types.name: ActivityEventList
types.description: List of activity events.

types.name: TimeRange
types.description: A time range filter for queries.

types.name: PaginationParams

validators.error_message: Offset must be non-negative and at most 100000.

types.description: Pagination parameters for list queries.

types.name: PaginatedResult

fields.name: items
fields.description: The page of items (type varies by endpoint).

fields.name: total
fields.description: Total number of items matching the query.

fields.name: hasMore
fields.description: Whether more items exist beyond this page.

types.description: A paginated list result with total count.

types.name: SafePath

fields.name: relative
fields.description: Path relative to the base directory.

fields.name: baseDir
fields.description: The base directory this path was validated against.

types.description: A validated filesystem path guaranteed free of directory traversal. Created only through validatePath.

types.name: DbMigration

fields.name: appliedAt
fields.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when migration was applied.

types.description: A database migration record.

types.name: DbMigrationList
types.description: List of applied migrations.

functions.name: validatePath
functions.description: Validates and resolves a file path against a base directory, preventing directory traversal attacks. Returns SafePath on success or error if path escapes base directory.

inputs.name: baseDir
inputs.description: The trusted base directory.

inputs.name: relativePath
inputs.description: The untrusted relative path to validate.

error_cases.name: base_not_absolute
error_cases.condition: baseDir is not an absolute path

preconditions: baseDir must be an absolute path
postconditions: On success, SafePath.absolute starts with SafePath.baseDir
On success, SafePath.relative contains no '..' segments

functions.name: readFileRaw
functions.description: Tier 2 internal: Reads a file's contents as a UTF-8 string using try-read-catch-ENOENT. Returns Result<str>. Not part of public facade.

inputs.name: filePath
inputs.description: Absolute path to the file to read.

preconditions: filePath must be an absolute path
postconditions: On success, value is the file contents as a string

functions.name: readDirectoryEntries
functions.description: Tier 2 internal: Lists entries in a directory. Returns Result<list of str> with entry names (not full paths).

inputs.name: dirPath
inputs.description: Absolute path to the directory.

inputs.name: filterExtension
inputs.description: Optional file extension filter (e.g., '.json'). Empty string means no filter.

error_cases.name: not_a_directory
error_cases.condition: Path exists but is not a directory

preconditions: dirPath must be an absolute path
postconditions: On success, value is a list of entry name strings

functions.name: parseOpenClawConfig
functions.description: Tier 2 parser (pure): Parses unknown data as OpenClaw config using Zod .safeParse(). No I/O.

inputs.name: data
inputs.description: Raw parsed JSON data (unknown type).

inputs.name: sourceFilePath
inputs.description: File path for error context (not read, just for error messages).

inputs.name: baseDir
inputs.description: Base directory to resolve relative workspace paths.

error_cases.name: malformed_data
error_cases.condition: Data does not match OpenClaw config Zod schema

error_cases.name: empty_data
error_cases.condition: Data is null, undefined, or empty object

postconditions: On success, value is a valid OpenClawConfig
On success, all agent workspaceDir paths are resolved to absolute paths

functions.name: parsePactYaml
functions.description: Tier 2 parser (pure): Parses raw YAML string as pact.yaml config using js-yaml safeLoad + Zod. No I/O.

inputs.name: yamlContent
inputs.description: Raw YAML string content.

inputs.name: sourceFilePath
inputs.description: File path for error context.

inputs.name: baseDir
inputs.description: Base directory for resolving relative paths.

error_cases.name: schema_mismatch
error_cases.condition: Parsed YAML does not match pact.yaml Zod schema

error_cases.name: empty_content
error_cases.condition: YAML content is empty or whitespace-only

postconditions: On success, value is a valid PactProjectConfig

functions.name: parsePactContract
functions.description: Tier 2 parser (pure): Parses raw JSON/YAML data as a PACT contract. No I/O.

inputs.name: data
inputs.description: Raw parsed data (unknown type).

inputs.name: sourceFilePath
inputs.description: File path for error context.

error_cases.name: malformed_contract
error_cases.condition: Data does not match contract Zod schema

postconditions: On success, value is a valid PactContract

functions.name: parseSessionCostData
functions.description: Tier 2 parser (pure): Parses raw JSON data from an agent session file to extract token/cost data. No I/O.

inputs.name: data
inputs.description: Raw parsed JSON session data.

inputs.name: sourceFilePath
inputs.description: File path for error context.

error_cases.name: malformed_session
error_cases.condition: Data does not match session Zod schema

error_cases.name: missing_cost_fields
error_cases.condition: Session data exists but lacks token/cost fields

postconditions: On success, value is a valid CostRecord

functions.name: parseDecompositionTree
functions.description: Tier 2 parser (pure): Parses decomposition directory structure data into a component tree. Takes a map of file paths to content.

inputs.name: fileEntries
inputs.description: Map of relative file path -> raw file content for all files in decomposition/ directory.

inputs.name: contractStatuses
inputs.description: Map of componentId -> ContractStatus string for cross-referencing.

inputs.name: implementedComponents
inputs.description: List of componentId strings that have source in src/.

inputs.name: testedComponents
inputs.description: List of componentId strings that have tests in tests/.

error_cases.name: malformed_decomposition
error_cases.condition: File contents cannot be parsed as decomposition nodes

postconditions: On success, value is a ComponentNodeList representing the root nodes of the tree
Every node's contractStatus matches contractStatuses map or defaults to 'missing'

functions.name: derivePipelinePhase
functions.description: Tier 2 utility (pure): Derives the current pipeline phase from directory existence and content counts.

inputs.name: hasDecomposition
inputs.description: Whether decomposition/ directory has content.

inputs.name: totalComponents
inputs.description: Total components in decomposition.

inputs.name: contractedCount
inputs.description: Components with contracts.

inputs.name: implementedCount
inputs.description: Components with source code.

inputs.name: testedCount
inputs.description: Components with passing tests.

postconditions: Returns 'not_started' if no decomposition and all counts are 0
Returns 'complete' if testedCount == totalComponents and totalComponents > 0

functions.name: getOpenClawConfig
functions.description: Facade: Reads and parses the OpenClaw configuration from openclaw.json at the given base directory. Cached with TTL.

inputs.name: baseDir
inputs.description: Absolute path to the OpenClaw project root containing openclaw.json.

error_cases.name: config_not_found
error_cases.condition: openclaw.json does not exist at baseDir

error_cases.name: config_malformed
error_cases.condition: openclaw.json exists but fails Zod validation

error_cases.name: permission_denied
error_cases.condition: Cannot read openclaw.json due to permissions

preconditions: baseDir must be an absolute path
postconditions: On success, value is a valid OpenClawConfig with all paths resolved

structured_side_effects.description: Reads OpenClaw config file from filesystem

functions.name: getAgent
functions.description: Facade: Gets a single agent definition by ID from the OpenClaw config.

inputs.name: baseDir
inputs.description: Absolute path to the OpenClaw project root.

inputs.name: agentId
inputs.description: The agent ID to look up.

error_cases.name: agent_not_found
error_cases.condition: No agent with given ID exists in config

preconditions: baseDir must be an absolute path
postconditions: On success, value is a valid AgentDefinition

structured_side_effects.description: Reads OpenClaw config to find agent

functions.name: listAgents
functions.description: Facade: Lists all agent definitions from the OpenClaw config.

inputs.name: baseDir
inputs.description: Absolute path to the OpenClaw project root.

preconditions: baseDir must be an absolute path
postconditions: On success, value is an AgentList (may be empty if config has no agents)

structured_side_effects.description: Reads OpenClaw config to list agents

functions.name: getProject
functions.description: Facade: Reads and assembles a full PACT project summary from a project directory. Composes parsers for pact.yaml, decomposition/, contracts/, tests/, and src/.

inputs.name: projectDir
inputs.description: Absolute path to the PACT project root containing pact.yaml.

error_cases.name: project_not_found
error_cases.condition: pact.yaml does not exist at projectDir

error_cases.name: permission_denied
error_cases.condition: Cannot read project directory or files

preconditions: projectDir must be an absolute path
postconditions: On success, value is a complete PactProjectSummary
totalComponents, contractedCount, implementedCount, testedCount are consistent with componentTree

structured_side_effects.description: Scans source directory for implementation status

functions.name: listProjects
functions.description: Facade: Discovers and summarizes all PACT projects under a base directory. Each subdirectory containing pact.yaml is treated as a project.

inputs.name: baseDir
inputs.description: Absolute path to the directory containing PACT project subdirectories.

preconditions: baseDir must be an absolute path
postconditions: On success, value is a PactProjectSummaryList
Projects with malformed pact.yaml are excluded from the list (logged, not thrown)

structured_side_effects.target: baseDir and all pact.yaml files in subdirectories
structured_side_effects.description: Scans directory tree for PACT projects
Logs warnings for malformed projects that are skipped

functions.name: getProjectPipelineStatus
functions.description: Facade: Returns just the pipeline phase and high-level counts for a project. Lighter weight than full getProject.

inputs.name: projectDir
inputs.description: Absolute path to the PACT project root.

preconditions: projectDir must be an absolute path
postconditions: On success, value contains phase, totalComponents, contractedCount, implementedCount, testedCount

structured_side_effects.description: Reads directory listings to derive phase

functions.name: getProjectContracts
functions.description: Facade: Lists all PACT contracts in a project's contracts/ directory.

inputs.name: projectDir
inputs.description: Absolute path to the PACT project root.

preconditions: projectDir must be an absolute path
postconditions: On success, value is a PactContractList

structured_side_effects.description: Reads all contract files in contracts/ directory

functions.name: getProjectTestResults
functions.description: Facade: Aggregates test results for all components in a project.

inputs.name: projectDir
inputs.description: Absolute path to the PACT project root.

preconditions: projectDir must be an absolute path
postconditions: On success, value is a PactTestSuiteList

functions.name: getProjectComponentTree
functions.description: Facade: Returns the component decomposition tree for a project.

inputs.name: projectDir
inputs.description: Absolute path to the PACT project root.

preconditions: projectDir must be an absolute path
postconditions: On success, value is a ComponentNodeList of root-level nodes

functions.name: getCostRecords
functions.description: Facade: Reads token/cost data from agent session files for a given time range.

inputs.name: baseDir
inputs.description: Absolute path to the OpenClaw project root (session files are in agent workspace dirs).

inputs.name: timeRange
inputs.description: Time range filter for cost records.

inputs.name: agentId
inputs.description: Optional agent ID filter. Empty string means all agents.

inputs.name: projectId
inputs.description: Optional project ID filter. Empty string means all projects.

error_cases.name: config_not_found
error_cases.condition: openclaw.json not found (needed to discover agent workspaces)

error_cases.name: no_sessions
error_cases.condition: No session files found matching criteria

preconditions: baseDir must be an absolute path
postconditions: On success, value is a CostRecordList sorted by startedAt descending
All records fall within timeRange if provided

structured_side_effects.description: Reads session files from each agent's workspace directory
Logs warnings for malformed session files that are skipped

functions.name: getCostSummary
functions.description: Facade: Aggregates cost records into a summary over a time range.

inputs.name: baseDir
inputs.description: Absolute path to the OpenClaw project root.

inputs.name: timeRange
inputs.description: Time range for aggregation.

error_cases.name: no_data
error_cases.condition: No cost records found in time range

preconditions: baseDir must be an absolute path
postconditions: On success, value is a valid CostSummary
totalCostUsd equals sum of all individual record costs
byAgent keys are a subset of known agent IDs

structured_side_effects.description: Reads session files for cost aggregation

functions.name: getActivityFeed
functions.description: Facade: Returns recent activity events from agent sessions and file changes, ordered by timestamp descending.

inputs.name: baseDir
inputs.description: Absolute path to the OpenClaw project root.

inputs.name: pagination
inputs.description: Pagination parameters.

inputs.name: agentId
inputs.description: Optional agent ID filter.

inputs.name: projectId
inputs.description: Optional project ID filter.

inputs.name: eventTypes
inputs.description: Optional list of ActivityEventType strings to filter by. Empty list means all types.

preconditions: baseDir must be an absolute path
postconditions: On success, value is a PaginatedResult with items of type ActivityEventList
Events are sorted by timestamp descending

structured_side_effects.target: Agent workspace session files and project directories
structured_side_effects.description: Reads multiple sources to compose activity feed

functions.name: initDatabase
functions.description: SQLite: Initializes the SQLite database, runs migrations, and enables WAL mode. Must be called once at application startup.

inputs.name: dbPath
inputs.description: Path to the SQLite database file. Use ':memory:' for in-memory test databases.

error_cases.name: db_create_failed
error_cases.condition: Cannot create or open database file

postconditions: On success, database is ready for queries
WAL mode is enabled (unless :memory:)
All migration files have been applied in order
migrations table exists and records applied migrations

structured_side_effects.description: Creates/opens SQLite database file and runs migrations

functions.name: closeDatabase
functions.description: SQLite: Closes the database connection gracefully.
preconditions: Database must have been initialized via initDatabase
postconditions: Database connection is closed
No further queries can be made until re-initialized

functions.name: getAppliedMigrations
functions.description: SQLite: Returns list of applied database migrations.
postconditions: On success, value is a DbMigrationList ordered by id ascending

functions.name: createTask
functions.description: SQLite Facade: Creates a new user task in SQLite.

inputs.name: input
inputs.description: Task creation parameters, validated with Zod.

postconditions: On success, value is the created UserTask with generated id, createdAt, updatedAt
Task status defaults to 'todo'
id is a UUID v4

functions.name: getTask
functions.description: SQLite Facade: Retrieves a single task by ID.

inputs.name: taskId
inputs.description: UUID of the task to retrieve.

error_cases.name: task_not_found
error_cases.condition: No task with given ID exists

postconditions: On success, value is a valid UserTask

functions.name: listTasks
functions.description: SQLite Facade: Lists tasks with optional filters and pagination.

inputs.name: pagination
inputs.description: Pagination parameters.

inputs.name: projectId
inputs.description: Optional project ID filter.

inputs.name: assignedAgentId
inputs.description: Optional agent ID filter.

inputs.name: status
inputs.description: Optional TaskStatus filter. Empty string means all statuses.

inputs.name: priority
inputs.description: Optional TaskPriority filter. Empty string means all priorities.

error_cases.name: invalid_filter
error_cases.condition: status or priority filter is not a valid enum value

postconditions: On success, value is a PaginatedResult with items of type UserTaskList
Results are ordered by createdAt descending

functions.name: updateTask
functions.description: SQLite Facade: Updates an existing task. Only provided fields are updated.

inputs.name: taskId
inputs.description: UUID of the task to update.

inputs.name: input
inputs.description: Fields to update, validated with Zod.

error_cases.name: task_not_found
error_cases.condition: No task with given ID exists

postconditions: On success, value is the updated UserTask
updatedAt is set to current timestamp
If status changes to 'done', completedAt is set to current timestamp
If status changes from 'done' to another status, completedAt is cleared

functions.name: deleteTask
functions.description: SQLite Facade: Deletes a task by ID.

inputs.name: taskId
inputs.description: UUID of the task to delete.

error_cases.name: task_not_found
error_cases.condition: No task with given ID exists

postconditions: On success, value is the deleted UserTask (returned before deletion)
Task no longer exists in database

functions.name: getUserPreferences
functions.description: SQLite Facade: Gets user preferences, creating default if not exists.

inputs.name: userId
inputs.description: User identifier. Default: 'default'.

postconditions: On success, value is a valid UserPreferences
If no preferences exist, returns defaults and persists them

structured_side_effects.description: May insert default preferences if none exist

functions.name: updateUserPreferences
functions.description: SQLite Facade: Updates user preferences. Merges with existing preferences.

inputs.name: userId
inputs.description: User identifier.

inputs.name: updates
inputs.description: Partial UserPreferences fields to update (validated with Zod).

postconditions: On success, value is the complete updated UserPreferences

functions.name: invalidateCache
functions.description: Cache: Invalidates cache entries. Can target specific keys, key prefixes, or clear all.

inputs.name: key
inputs.description: Exact cache key to invalidate. Empty string means use prefix or clear all.

inputs.name: prefix
inputs.description: Key prefix to invalidate (all keys starting with this prefix). Empty string and empty key means clear all.

postconditions: Returns count of entries invalidated
Invalidated entries are immediately removed from cache

structured_side_effects.description: Removes entries from the TTL cache

functions.name: getCacheStats
functions.description: Cache: Returns current cache statistics.
postconditions: All counts are non-negative

invariants: Components and API routes MUST import only from lib/data/ facade — never from lib/openclaw/, lib/pact/, or lib/db/ directly
All filesystem reads use try-read-catch-ENOENT pattern — never fs.existsSync or fs.access before reading
All external data (files, CLI output) is validated through Zod .safeParse() before entering the domain
All date/time values are represented as ISO 8601 strings (YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ss.sssZ)
All Result error variants carry the originating file path and original error message for debugging
SQLite database operates in WAL mode for concurrent read performance
Base directory paths are always function parameters — never hardcoded or read from env inside parsers
Parse functions are pure (no I/O) and can be tested with inline fixture data
Read functions are async and perform filesystem I/O, returning Result<unknown>
No 'any' types — use 'unknown' + type narrowing via Zod
Cache entries have explicit TTL and can be invalidated programmatically via invalidateCache
File paths are validated to prevent directory traversal (no '..' components after resolution)
All public facade functions are async, even if underlying implementation is synchronous, for API uniformity
